options.text: He can speak three languages, wasn’t he?
options.explanation: Incorrect because the verb in the main clause is “can” (a modal verb), but the tag “wasn’t he” uses the past tense of “be,” which does not match.

questions.explanation: The correct tag is “can’t he” because the statement is positive, so the tag must be negative.
